Student Remarks.0-10: Needs attention. The student has not yet shown understanding of the skills and requires clear guidance and support.
Student Remarks.11-20: Very limited progress. The student is struggling with skills and needs more practice and focused help.
Student Remarks.21-30: Below expectations. The student shows basic awareness but is still unable to apply the skills independently.
Student Remarks.31-40: Developing slowly. The student can attempt the skills with support but needs regular practice to improve.
Student Remarks.41-50: Emerging understanding. The student shows partial understanding and is starting to apply the skills with guidance.
Student Remarks.51-60: Satisfactory. The student demonstrates average understanding and can perform the skills with some assistance.
Student Remarks.61-70: Steady progress. The student shows reasonable understanding and can apply the skills in familiar situations.
Student Remarks.71-80: Good performance. The student understands the skills well and applies it confidently in most cases.
Student Remarks.81-90: Very good. The student demonstrates strong command of the skills and applies it consistently with minimal support.
Student Remarks.91-100: Excellent. The student fully understands the skills and applies it confidently and independently in all situations.

Grade Remarks.0-10: Overall performance is very low. The grade needs strong academic support, clearer guidance and consistent follow-up to build basic understanding.
Grade Remarks.11-20: The grade is struggling across most areas. Focused intervention and structured practice are required to lift overall learning levels.
Grade Remarks.21-30: Performance is below expectations. Students show limited understanding and would benefit from targeted support and improved classroom engagement.
Grade Remarks.31-40: Progress is slow but visible. The grade is developing foundational skills but still needs regular reinforcement and improved consistency.
Grade Remarks.41-50: Average understanding with noticeable gaps. The grade can perform basic tasks but requires further practice to strengthen concepts.
Grade Remarks.51-60: Satisfactory performance. The grade shows steady progress and can handle familiar tasks but needs support to reach higher mastery.
Grade Remarks.61-70: Good overall effort. Students demonstrate reasonable understanding and show potential for stronger outcomes with continued practice.
Grade Remarks.71-80: A well-performing grade. Students show solid understanding, good engagement and consistent application of skills.
Grade Remarks.81-90: Very strong performance. The grade demonstrates high competence, good clarity of concepts and confidence in applying skills.
Grade Remarks.91-100: Excellent performance. The grade shows outstanding understanding, strong concept clarity and consistent mastery across all areas.

School Remarks.0–10%: The school’s overall performance is very low and indicates a strong need for academic support, structured planning and consistent follow-up to build foundational learning.
School Remarks.11–20%: The school is struggling across most areas. Focused intervention, teacher support and improved classroom practices are required to raise the overall learning level.
School Remarks.21–30%: Performance is below expectations. Students show limited understanding, and the school would benefit from strengthened teaching strategies and better learning engagement.
School Remarks.31–40%: Progress is slow but improving. The school is developing basic skills but needs stronger reinforcement and consistent monitoring to ensure stability in performance.
School Remarks.41–50%: Overall understanding is average with clear gaps. The school can manage basic learning outcomes but requires more targeted efforts to improve concept clarity and application.
School Remarks.51–60%: Satisfactory performance. The school shows steady progress and acceptable understanding but needs ongoing support to reach higher academic standards.
School Remarks.61–70%: Good overall performance. Students show reasonable understanding, and the school has the potential to achieve stronger results with continuous improvement strategies.
School Remarks.71–80%: A well-performing school. Students demonstrate solid learning outcomes, good engagement and consistent application of skills across classes.
School Remarks.81–90%: Very strong performance. The school shows high learning standards, strong concept clarity and confidence in applying skills across multiple grades.
School Remarks.91–100%: Excellent performance. The school demonstrates outstanding understanding, strong academic practices and consistent mastery across all areas.

Teacher Remarks.0–10%: The teacher needs significant support. Core teaching practices, student engagement and lab management require immediate improvement.
Teacher Remarks.11–20%: Performance is well below expectations. The teacher needs structured guidance and professional development to improve lab delivery.
Teacher Remarks.21–30%: Basic performance with clear gaps. More effort is needed in planning, instruction and supporting students during lab activities.
Teacher Remarks.31–40%: Developing but inconsistent. The teacher shows effort but needs regular support to strengthen lab teaching skills.
Teacher Remarks.41–50%: Average performance. Some lab practices are in place, but concept clarity and lab handling need improvement.
Teacher Remarks.51–60%: Satisfactory level. The teacher shows reasonable understanding of lab procedures and can improve further with targeted training.
Teacher Remarks.61–70%: Good performance. The teacher demonstrates solid lab teaching skills and steady progress in guiding students during activities.
Teacher Remarks.71–80%: Strong performance. Lab sessions are planned well; students stay engaged and the learning environment is effective.
Teacher Remarks.81–90%: Very good performance. The teacher shows strong command of lab-based teaching strategies and maintains a productive environment.
Teacher Remarks.91–100%: Excellent performance. Highly effective lab teaching, strong management and consistent delivery of quality hands-on learning experiences.
